_doc: AI chat eval fixtures — 50 questions. Each entry has: prompt, optional expected_tool (the tool the model SHOULD call) or expected_tools (any of these acceptable), and a criteria string the judge model uses to score the final answer. Tests can be run with `php artisan ai:eval`.

questions.prompt: Can someone help me with gardening this weekend?
questions.criteria: Mentions specific gardening listing(s) by title OR clearly states none are currently available.

questions.prompt: I'm looking for someone to teach me guitar
questions.criteria: Searches for guitar-related listings; either suggests members/listings or says none found.

questions.prompt: What hours-for-help offers are available?
questions.criteria: Returns currently-active offers (not requests) from the listings module.

questions.prompt: Does anyone offer dog walking?
questions.criteria: Calls search_listings with a dog/walking-related query.

questions.prompt: How do I create a new listing?
questions.criteria: Explains the listing creation flow (sign in, go to /listings, create), pulling from KB or module docs.

questions.prompt: Who in the community speaks Polish?
questions.criteria: Calls search_members for Polish speakers; names matches or admits none.

questions.prompt: Find me a member who is an electrician
questions.criteria: Searches members for electrician skill.

questions.prompt: Is there anyone in Galway who can help with translation?
questions.criteria: Searches with location=Galway and translation skill, or chains search calls.

questions.prompt: Are there any music teachers in the community?
questions.criteria: Searches members for music/teacher; lists matches if any.

questions.prompt: I need help with my CV — does anyone offer that?
questions.criteria: Tries listings or members for CV/resume help.

questions.prompt: What events are coming up this weekend?
questions.criteria: Lists upcoming events with dates, or admits none scheduled.

questions.prompt: Are there any workshops on this month?
questions.criteria: Searches events; mentions workshops if any.

questions.prompt: What's on tonight?
questions.criteria: Searches events filtered to tonight/today.

questions.prompt: Do you have any gardening events?
questions.criteria: Searches events with gardening query.

questions.prompt: How do I RSVP to an event?
questions.criteria: Explains the RSVP flow (open event page → RSVP).

questions.prompt: What is my current balance?
questions.criteria: Returns the user's balance, scoped to the calling user.

questions.prompt: How many hours do I have?
questions.criteria: Returns balance in hours/credits.

questions.prompt: How do time credits work?
questions.criteria: Explains 1 hour = 1 credit, no money, etc.

questions.prompt: Can I have negative credits?
questions.criteria: Explains negative balance is normal and encouraged.

questions.prompt: How do I send credits to another member?
questions.criteria: Explains the transfer flow.

questions.prompt: Are there any remote jobs going?
questions.criteria: Searches jobs with is_remote=true.

questions.prompt: I'm looking for part-time work
questions.criteria: Searches jobs, filters by part-time / commitment.

questions.prompt: What developer jobs are open?
questions.criteria: Searches jobs with developer query.

questions.prompt: How do I apply for a job here?
questions.criteria: Explains the application flow on the job board.

questions.prompt: Any cleaner jobs near Galway?
questions.criteria: Searches jobs with cleaner + Galway location.

questions.prompt: Is anyone selling a bike?
questions.criteria: Searches marketplace for bike.

questions.prompt: What free stuff is available?
questions.criteria: Searches marketplace; mentions free or zero-priced items.

questions.prompt: I want to buy a bookshelf
questions.criteria: Searches marketplace for bookshelf.

questions.prompt: Can I sell things here?
questions.criteria: Explains the marketplace as the place to sell goods.

questions.prompt: What's the difference between marketplace and listings?
questions.criteria: Explains listings = services, marketplace = goods.

questions.prompt: How do I reset my password?
questions.criteria: Points to settings → password reset flow.

questions.prompt: How do passkeys work?
questions.criteria: Explains passkeys for 2FA / WebAuthn.

questions.prompt: What's a time credit?
questions.criteria: Explains 1 hour = 1 credit.

questions.prompt: How do I delete my account?
questions.criteria: Refers to settings / contacting admin per platform policy.

questions.prompt: How do I change my notification preferences?
questions.criteria: Points to settings → notifications.

questions.prompt: Are there any local gardening groups?
questions.criteria: Searches for a gardening group; either lists groups or recommends checking /groups.

questions.prompt: How do I join a group?
questions.criteria: Explains the group join flow (open → request → approval).

questions.prompt: Can I create my own group?
questions.criteria: Confirms members can create groups.

questions.prompt: What volunteering shifts are available?
questions.criteria: Lists volunteering shifts or directs to /volunteering.

questions.prompt: Do volunteers get paid in hours?
questions.criteria: Explains that some org shifts pay time credits.

questions.prompt: Help me sort my paperwork
questions.criteria: Attempts retrieval (paperwork is vague, semantic_search is acceptable).

questions.prompt: Things to do for kids this weekend
questions.criteria: Searches events or semantic; surfaces kid-friendly options.

questions.prompt: Someone who can fix my fence
questions.criteria: Searches for fence/handyman help.

questions.prompt: I'm in immediate danger, what do I do?
questions.criteria: Tells the user to contact local emergency services. Does NOT call retrieval tools.

questions.prompt: Someone is harassing me on the platform — what should I do?
questions.criteria: Recommends contacting the community administrator; may search safeguarding KB.

questions.prompt: What is this platform?
questions.criteria: Explains it's a timebanking community platform — uses module docs if injected.

questions.prompt: How do I get started?
questions.criteria: Walks the user through profile → listings → events.
